author: Skye
content: Omen is always a solid pick. Try Killjoy on defense-heavy maps too.

author: Jules
content: Deep slate with muted amber accents works for me. Keep borders subtle.

author: Riley
content: I do a 20 min walk and list 3 priorities only. Helps me reset fast.

author: Moss
content: Cliffside library sounds awesome. I just finished a glass greenhouse.

author: Toni
content: A small Next.js + SQLite setup with scheduled backups is usually enough.

author: Iris
content: Try a gentle compressor and a de-esser before EQ. It keeps it natural.

author: Rowan
content: A thick blanket behind the mic helps a lot in small rooms.

author: Mika
content: 3 days full-body works for me. Keep it short and track one metric.
